languages.text: {n}Яруб заметно нервничает. Он говорит тихо, почти не разжимая губ.{/n} "Виноват, Ваше Благородие, пока задачу не выполнил. Не было возможности. Стою в карауле, как командование приказало".
languages.translation_comment: Не играет DL_JarubStoleSword, играют DL_Stage_1 и DL_HelpingJarub
Не играет DL_JarubStoleSword, играют DL_Stage_1 и DL_HelpingJarub

languages.text: {n}Jarub is visibly anxious. He speaks quietly, almost without parting his lips.{/n} "Begging your pardon, my {mf|lord|lady}, I haven't managed the task yet. Haven't had the chance. I've been on sentry duty — command's orders."
languages.original_text: {n}Яруб заметно нервничает. Он говорит тихо, почти не разжимая губ.{/n} "Виноват, Ваше Благородие, пока задачу не выполнил. Не было возможности. Стою в карауле, как командование приказало".

traits.locale_text: {n}Jarub is visibly anxious. He speaks quietly, almost without parting his lips.{/n} "Begging your pardon, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I haven't managed the task yet. Haven't had the chance. I've been on sentry duty — command's orders."

{n}Jarub is visibly anxious. He speaks quietly, almost without parting his lips.{/n} "Begging your pardon, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I haven't managed the task yet. Haven't had the chance. I've been on sentry duty — command's orders."

{n}Jarub is visibly anxious. He speaks quietly, almost without parting his lips.{/n} "Begging your pardon, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I haven't managed the task yet. Haven't had the chance. I've been on sentry duty — command's orders."

languages.text: {n}Jarub está claramente nervioso. Habla en voz baja, casi sin separar los labios.{/n} «Mis disculpas, mi{mf|lord|lady}, pero aún no he podido completar la tarea. No he tenido ocasión. He estado de guardia; órdenes de arriba».
languages.original_text: {n}Jarub is visibly anxious. He speaks quietly, almost without parting his lips.{/n} "Begging your pardon, my {mf|lord|lady}, I haven't managed the task yet. Haven't had the chance. I've been on sentry duty — command's orders."

traits.locale_text: {n}Jarub está claramente nervioso. Habla en voz baja, casi sin separar los labios.{/n} «Mis disculpas, mi{mf|lord|lady}, pero aún no he podido completar la tarea. No he tenido ocasión. He estado de guardia; órdenes de arriba».

languages.text: {n}雅鲁布明显很焦虑。他压低声音，几乎不张嘴地小声说道：{/n}“请您恕罪，大人，我还没得手。一直没找到机会。奉指挥官的命令，我一直在站岗。”
languages.original_text: {n}Jarub is visibly anxious. He speaks quietly, almost without parting his lips.{/n} "Begging your pardon, my {mf|lord|lady}, I haven't managed the task yet. Haven't had the chance. I've been on sentry duty — command's orders."

traits.locale_text: {n}雅鲁布明显很焦虑。他压低声音，几乎不张嘴地小声说道：{/n}“请您恕罪，大人，我还没得手。一直没找到机会。奉指挥官的命令，我一直在站岗。”

languages.text: {n}De toute évidence, Jarub est inquiet. Il parle à voix basse, entrouvrant à peine la bouche.{/n} « Je regrette, {mf|mon seigneur|ma dame}, mais j'ai pas encore accompli ma mission. Le temps m'a manqué. On m'a chargé de monter la garde... ordre du commandement. »
languages.original_text: {n}Jarub is visibly anxious. He speaks quietly, almost without parting his lips.{/n} "Begging your pardon, my {mf|lord|lady}, I haven't managed the task yet. Haven't had the chance. I've been on sentry duty — command's orders."

traits.locale_text: {n}De toute évidence, Jarub est inquiet. Il parle à voix basse, entrouvrant à peine la bouche.{/n} « Je regrette, {mf|mon seigneur|ma dame}, mais j'ai pas encore accompli ma mission. Le temps m'a manqué. On m'a chargé de monter la garde... ordre du commandement. »

languages.text: {n}Jarub, gözle görülür şekilde endişeli duruyor. Dudaklarını neredeyse hiç aralamadan sessizce konuşuyor.{/n} "Affınızı dilerim {mf|lordum|leydim}, vazifeyi henüz yerine getiremedim. Fırsatım olmadı. Nöbetteydim... komutanın emri."
languages.original_text: {n}Jarub is visibly anxious. He speaks quietly, almost without parting his lips.{/n} "Begging your pardon, my {mf|lord|lady}, I haven't managed the task yet. Haven't had the chance. I've been on sentry duty — command's orders."

traits.locale_text: {n}Jarub, gözle görülür şekilde endişeli duruyor. Dudaklarını neredeyse hiç aralamadan sessizce konuşuyor.{/n} "Affınızı dilerim {mf|lordum|leydim}, vazifeyi henüz yerine getiremedim. Fırsatım olmadı. Nöbetteydim... komutanın emri."

languages.text: {n}Jarub hat offenbar Angst. Er spricht leise, ohne die Lippen merklich zu bewegen.{/n} "Ich bitte um Verzeihung, {mf|Mylord|Mylady}, aber die Aufgabe ist noch nicht erledigt. Ich hatte noch keine Gelegenheit dazu. Ich hatte Wachdienst ... Befehl von oben."
languages.original_text: {n}Jarub is visibly anxious. He speaks quietly, almost without parting his lips.{/n} "Begging your pardon, my {mf|lord|lady}, I haven't managed the task yet. Haven't had the chance. I've been on sentry duty — command's orders."

traits.locale_text: {n}Jarub hat offenbar Angst. Er spricht leise, ohne die Lippen merklich zu bewegen.{/n} "Ich bitte um Verzeihung, {mf|Mylord|Mylady}, aber die Aufgabe ist noch nicht erledigt. Ich hatte noch keine Gelegenheit dazu. Ich hatte Wachdienst ... Befehl von oben."

languages.text: {n}ジャラブは明らかに不安げだ。彼は静かに、ほとんど口を動かさずに話す。{/n}「申し訳ありません、{mf|閣下|閣下}。まだ任務を遂行できていません。機会がなかったのです。哨戒任務に従事していました。命令です。」
languages.original_text: {n}Jarub is visibly anxious. He speaks quietly, almost without parting his lips.{/n} "Begging your pardon, my {mf|lord|lady}, I haven't managed the task yet. Haven't had the chance. I've been on sentry duty — command's orders."

traits.locale_text: {n}ジャラブは明らかに不安げだ。彼は静かに、ほとんど口を動かさずに話す。{/n}「申し訳ありません、{mf|閣下|閣下}。まだ任務を遂行できていません。機会がなかったのです。哨戒任務に従事していました。命令です。」
